#  Filter Drawing Markups (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool on your Android device.
  2. Tap the drawing you would like to view.
  3. Tap **Filters**.  
  
![Drawings Android Filter Drawing Markups](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2d2ca5c172ed50f5433532b6843468ef/e7c660f30d4fe069640da600038f97ab/drawings-android-filter-drawing-markups.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Select which type of markup or layer you want to view by tapping the **eye** icons.
     * Orange eye icons ![Icon View Layer Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/22eb6f3614b94dc7d5fa406cf20e1513/e2c10c4541dbc4ed7153c1745764389b/icon-view-layer-android.png?fm=webp&h=20) indicate the markup is visible.
     * Gray eye icons   
  
![Drawings Android Filter Drawing Markups Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cb45d6eae899d63d661077a8c2566166/0228e7ae299f87a1a6a77b98f3138b99/drawings-android-filter-drawing-markups-menu.png?fm=webp)  



## See Also

  * [Delete Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/delete-drawing-markups-android)
  * [Publish Personal Drawing Markups (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-android/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups-android)
title: Filter Drawing Markups (Android)
description: How to filter drawing markups in the Drawings tool on your Android mobile device.
